thoughts.text: The present moment is the only thing that exists.
Live your own life. You can only be you.
There are many correct ways of living life. Find your own way of living yours.
We will all die someday. Don't take yourself too seriously.
Life is long.
All these things that we build are chapters of a very long book. They are not the book itself.
Creativity comes from structure.
What regret can you live with?
Preserve optionality while accumulating specific knowledge.
It's only worth rowing when there's a wave behind you
Your body is a vehicle. Take care of it.
Pay attention to what you eat, how you rest, how you move.
Fear is the enemy.
Embarrassment is an under-explored emotion.
A lot of the things we want are on the other side of cringe.
Say no a lot.
In an argument between two people, usually both people are right.
You shouldn't desire something that doesn't want to be given to you.
When you're starting to see someone and you see something wrong, jump. You don't need to fix someone's traumas.
In relationships, there's a goalkeeper and there's a scorer. Each person brings a different thing to the table.
You can't validate what has never been validated for you.
The most important decision you'll make in your life is who you marry and who you start a family with.
It's non-negotiable that your romantic partner is a good person. Everything else, even if important, comes second. Don't optimise for looks, money, or intelligence.
Happiness is found inside.
Happiness is peace in motion.
Peace is the absence of desire.
You should only desire a few things at once.
Emotional attachment to material things is dangerous. Everything material is impermanent.
Design makes the world a better place.
Design is an exercise in intention.
Design is about how you do things.
Good design is about the removal of excess.
Everything in the world is designed.
High agency and taste are the two main skills you need to hone and develop to succeed in the age of AI.
Curiosity is the engine of action.
